description_long: This is a softcover book with a predominantly black cover and white text, featuring a striking monochrome illustration on the front. The book is rectangular and moderately thick, with a visible spine that displays the title and author in vertical orientation. The front cover artwork depicts a detailed, stylized figure surrounded by intricate linework and organic elements, giving it a graphic novel or contemporary art feel. The back cover contains additional text and appears to be free of major graphics, maintaining the minimalist black-and-white theme. The book's edges are clean and the corners are slightly rounded, typical of modern trade paperbacks. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary publication, likely intended for an adult or young adult audience.
description: A black softcover book with bold white text and a detailed monochrome illustration on the front, featuring a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing vertical white text on a black background with a small triangle icon at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, featuring a bold white title and a detailed monochrome illustration of a figure surrounded by artistic elements.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the top edge, revealing its thickness and the light gray color of the pages.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, displaying white text on a plain black background with no major illustrations.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a detailed, monochrome illustration of a long-haired figure holding a bouquet, surrounded by intricate linework and organic, plant-like elements. The style is graphic and contemporary, with high contrast and fine details that draw attention to the central character.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with vertically oriented white text displaying the title and author, and includes small white triangle icons at the top and bottom. The design is minimalist and modern, matching the overall aesthetic of the book.
